sessionName: Hyp A — incline 155 bump + pushdown 27.5 attempt
intro: Bumps today: incline 150->155 Build scheme 1x5 @ 155 + AMRAP @ 135 (Adj #168); pushdown 25->27.5 pain-gated (Adj #183).

table.cue: If 155x5 lands <=RIR 1 -> back to 150 next Tue (Adj #168). TM 168 stands
Hold 30 — a firm opener (<=RIR 2) opens the bump conversation (Adj #169)
Bump-eligible 75 on an Adj #150-shape outing: openers >=RIR 3, set 3 clean RIR 1 (Adj #170)
Any elbow symptom -> stay 25 and the 10.A clock resets (Adj #183)
Rebuild to full 3x12; no revert to BW (Adj #172)
Repeat RIR 4 opener -> one-step nudge 140 next Tue (Adj #173)

lift.warmup: Pre-lift wrist-extensor isometric 3x30 s/arm (10.A). 1-2 min dynamic: band pull-aparts, scap push-ups. Incline BB: bar x8, 95x5, 115x3, then working.
lift.cooldown: Tyler twists 3x15 + reverse Tyler 3x15 (daily dose). Daily SI prehab.

currentLoads.lastVerified: W13 Tue 7/14 (Build debut: 150×5 RIR 3 top + AMRAP 135×12 RIR 0)
currentLoads.note: 150 BUMP LANDED at the RPE 7 target — two clicks clear of the ≤RIR 1 revert (Adj #148 resolved); AMRAP 135×12 → e1RM ~189, TM 168 stands. §5 clean-reps rule → bump 155 next Tue (1×5 @ 155 + AMRAP @ 135); if 155×5 lands ≤RIR 1 → back to 150 (Adj #168)

First clean read at 165 proper (W12's ran behind the 170 mis-load) — sets 1-3 held the 8 floor with a clean front half, but set 3 ran to failure and set 4 fell to 6. Hold 165 — bump-eligible 170 on a clean 4×8 with set 3 RIR 1 (Adj #155/#179)

75→80 BUMP LANDED on load (Adj #156 resolved) — set 1 held the 10 floor @ RIR 1, sets 2-3 fell 9/8 to failure = standard new-load shape. Hold 80; re-earn the ladder condition (full 3×10 with sets 1-2 ≥RIR 1) before the next 5-lb step toward the pre-reset 85 (Adj #180)

Tightest mid-block of the 6-set dose (2/1/1 vs W12's 2/2/2), closer to failure at 13 — but the opener held RIR 3. Hold 30 — don't bump on a soft opener; a firm opener (≤RIR 2) opens the bump conversation (Adj #127/#149/#169)
Rebuild flat — same 44-rep total as the debut, reshuffled; sets 2-4 under the 12 floor, all to failure. Hold 35, rebuild to all-4-in-band before any further move; Tue slot unaffected (Adj #157/#181)

65→70 BUMP LANDED (Adj #150 resolved) — near-identical landing shape to the 65 debut: sets 1-3 held the 10 floor behind an RIR 2 opener, set 4 fell to 8. Hold 70; bump-eligible 75 on an Adj #150-shape outing. Sat slot unaffected (Adj #170)
Half-step back from the W12 best — identical openers (RIR 3/2), set 3 gave back its 12 (11, to failure), set 4 nudged 8→9. Hold 60; the clean-with-reps-to-spare condition stands (Adj #182)

Hold-until-clean SATISFIED — set 3 clean RIR 1 at the full 12 (the Adj #136-shape clearance), set 4 held 8. 27.5 attempt eligible next slot (W14 Tue), pain-gated per the Adj #110/#136 ladder. Elbow fully clean — 5th consecutive clean session, §10.A clock intact (Adj #183)
Opener drifted to RIR 4 one week after landing at the prescribed RIR 3; set 2 RIR 2. One soft set — hold 135; a repeat RIR 4 opener next Tue → one-step nudge 140 (Adj #173)

345→355 BUMP LANDED through the Adj #160 AM gate — swept 4×12 at the band floor, but sets 2-4 all to failure = the same zero-headroom landing as 345's debut, opener one notch better. Hold 355 — no 365 until sets 1-3 ≥RIR 1; future bumps stay AM-gated (Adj #185)

currentLoads.load: BW+10 lb at BOTH slots (hold, rebuild) — Tue to 3×12, Sat to 3×10
currentLoads.note: Sat rebuild nearly there — sets 1-2 at/over target with reserve (12 RIR 2 / 10 RIR 1 vs the debut's 10/8/5 all-RIR-0); set 3 fell to 7, so the gate (set 3 ≥RIR 1-2) rests on set 3 alone. Tue rebuild unchanged. Hold +10 both slots; no revert to BW (Adj #172/#184)

Re-read RESOLVED (Adj #121/#140/#162 chain closed) — normal rest restored, both sets at the 12 target @ RIR 3 = exactly the RPE 7 ask; the W10/W12 failure reads were execution artifacts, not a ceiling. Hold 130 — RIR 3 is the target here, not headroom to spend (Adj #186)
